courses.title: Introduction to C Programming
courses.description: Learn the fundamentals of C programming: variables, control flow, functions, pointers, and memory management.
courses.creator: Kvasir Team

courses.title: Python Basics
courses.description: A gentle introduction to Python: data types, loops, functions, file I/O, and basic data structures.
courses.creator: Kvasir Team

courses.title: Git Fundamentals
courses.description: Master version control with Git: repos, branches, merges, remotes, and collaboration workflows.
courses.creator: Kvasir Team

courses.title: Data Structures in C
courses.description: Implement linked lists, hash tables, trees, and graphs from scratch in C.
courses.creator: Kvasir Team

courses.title: Advanced Systems Programming
courses.description: Register allocation, memory safety, lock-free data structures, cache-oblivious algorithms, and a capstone design challenge.
courses.creator: Kvasir Team
